description: Style Note It's not only women who like to experiment with the shape, styles and colours of their footwear as men are not far behind. Check out shoes for men from globalite. Globalite offers casual shoes in different styles which can go well with any outfit. Team these shoes with denims and a stylish tee to up your style quotient. Product Details Black shoe with mesh upper, central lace-ups, synthetic overlays and reinforced overlay at the heel counter Padded tongue and inner Foamy rubber midsole TPU outsole with waffle pattern and horizontal grooves Material and Care Synthetic, mesh Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
